title: Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple
tagline: Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thiruvallam Sree Parasurama Swami Temple is one of the most ancient temples of South India.
overview.description: Thiruvallam Sree Parasurama Swami Temple is one of the most ancient temples of South India. It is situated on the banks of Karamana River near Thiruvallam, Thiruvananthapuram. It is the only temple in Kerala that is dedicated to Lord Parasurama. and counts among the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of Vaishnavate tradition.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Poonthura
topPlaces.description: Poonthura is a suburb of Thiruvananthapuram the capital of Kerala, India. It is on the landing path of flights to Thiruvananthapuram International Airport and is about 5 kilometers from the capital city.

topPlaces.name: Karamana River
topPlaces.description: Karamana is a river flowing through the city of Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, India. The river starts near the southern tip of the Western Ghats(Sahyadri Mountains) at Agastyar Koodam.

topPlaces.name: Konchiravila Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Konchiravila Devi Temple is a temple located at Konchiravila in Trivandrum district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Aryankuzhi
topPlaces.description: Aryankuzhi is a residential area in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. It is just 3 kilometres away from the heart of Trivandrum city.

topPlaces.name: Aryankuzhi Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Aryankuzhi Devi Temple is a famous devi temple located at Aryankuzhi, Trivandrum district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Attukal Temple
topPlaces.description: The Attukal Bhagavathy Temple is a Hindu shrine located at Attukal in Kerala, India. It is situated near the heart of the city, two kilometres away from the Padmanabhaswamy Temple, East Fort, in Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Mukkolakkal Bhagawathi Temple
topPlaces.description: The Mukkolakkal Bhagawathi Temple (Malayalam: മുക്കോലക്കല്‍ ഭഗവതി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a famous temple of the Hindu mother goddess Bhagawati. One of the renowned Goddess Temples in Kerala, Sree Varaham Mukkolackal Bhagavathi Temple is situated at Sreevaraham, on the south-east of Sree Padmanabha Swamy Temple in Thiruvananthapuram.

topPlaces.name: Attukal
topPlaces.description: Attukal is a Hindu pilgrimage centre located on the banks of Killi river, in the capital city of Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India. It is situated about two kilometres to the south-east from the Padmanabhaswamy Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (6 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (5 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruvallam Parasurama Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Poonthura, Karamana River, Konchiravila Devi Temple, Aryankuzhi, Aryankuzhi Devi Temple.
